arts.ttl: Player admits Liverpool offer caught him by surprise – “Uncomfortable” moment forced him into isolation
arts.sum: Real Sociedad star Martin Zubimendi has admitted he was caught by surprise by Liverpool’s bid for him in the summer and had to isolate himself before turning them down. El Diario Vasco have an interview with the 25-year-old today after a summer in which he found himself firmly in the spotlight. arts.sum: Tottenham have scored 36 goals - the second highest in the top flight - but have shown huge vulnerabilities at the other end too, with their chaotic 4-3 win over Manchester United in midweek summing up their season

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou could lose more Tottenham stars with five players facing suspension risk
arts.sum: As ever, any player who obtains five yellow cards from the first 19 Premier League games of the season will receive a one-match ban as punishment. Bentancur is the Tottenham player most at risk of receiving a one-match ban for five yellow cards as he is currently on four.

arts.ttl: 'My hero' - Ange Postecoglou admits he was left starstruck after meeting Liverpool legend
arts.sum: Arne Slot joked he was being overly positive about Tottenham Hotspur on Friday - but Ange Postecoglou has admitted he was once left starstruck after meeting a Liverpool legend

arts.ttl: Liverpool told to pay £40-50m for January target on Arsenal and Man United radar
arts.sum: Liverpool are keen on signing Antonee Robinson from Fulham in january. According to Football Insider, they will have to pay a fee of around £40-50 million in order to sign the USMNT star.
